name: serene
description: Calm, peaceful, meditative; gentle pacing and soft visuals.

name: chaotic
description: Frantic, overwhelming, unpredictable; high object density and fast tempo.

name: melancholy
description: Wistful, contemplative, sad-beautiful; slow strings and fading elements.

name: mischievous
description: Playful trickery and gleeful trolling; bouncy motion and surprise twists.

name: majestic
description: Grand, ceremonial, awe-inspiring; sweeping motion, brass and choir.

name: anxious
description: Building tension, just-barely-coping; rising pitch and narrowing windows.

name: absurd
description: Surreal, dreamlike, comic-strange; non-sequiturs and impossible geometry.

name: triumphant
description: Heroic ascending energy; expanding visuals and victory motifs.

name: haunted
description: Spectral, uneasy, half-seen; muted colours and lingering shadows.

name: celebratory
description: Festive, joyful, expressive; bright colours and confetti motion.

name: dreamlike
description: Soft-focused, slow-fading transitions, surreal logic; objects melt and reform with no urgency.

name: defiant
description: Punk anti-authority energy; jagged motion, broken grids, raised middle-finger attitude.

name: nostalgic
description: Warm sepia memory tint; lo-fi grain, gentle vignette, like a faded family photo.

name: focused
description: Cool concentration; minimal distraction, single bright target on neutral ground.

name: euphoric
description: Manic joyful overload; rainbow flashes, hyperactive trails, peak runner's-high vibe.

name: stoic
description: Monumental and unmoved; slow heavy motion, deliberate restraint, weight of mountains.
